etymology.description: Phonetic 𡍬 + Semantic 貝(貝) (bèi, "cowry") = selling/trading-related character -> further simplified to 士(士) (shì, "scholar") and 四(四) (sì, "four") components to form current shape
etymology.interpretation: The character 𧶠 originally combined 𡍬 for sound and 貝(貝) (bèi, "cowry") representing the concept of trade or value. The character evolved through successive simplifications in its phonetic component to arrive at its current form.
